allow.description: Additional canonical ids to allow beyond the defaults (--allow).

cwd.description: Working directory used to resolve the app when a call omits a path.

deny.description: Canonical ids to deny; deny wins over allow (--deny).

maxConcurrent.description: Cap on concurrent in-flight tool calls (default 4).
maxConcurrent.title: positive

tooling.description: Whether to project tooling tasks as tools (--tooling).

transport.description: Transport; stdio only in v4.0 (streamable-HTTP is deferred).
